zh.lifeSummary: 當Steven Webber於1526年出生在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德時，他的父親John Weaver Webber26歲，母親Edith Elizabeth Hatch28歲。他於大約1545年與Thomesen Hooper在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1606年在英國英格蘭戴文迪維頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Steven Webber于1526年出生在英国英格兰戴文比德福德时，他的父亲John Weaver Webber26岁，母亲Edith Elizabeth Hatch28岁。他于大约1545年与Thomesen Hooper在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1606年在英国英格兰戴文迪維頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Steven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Steven Webber was born in 1526, in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Weaver Webber, was 26 and his mother, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, was 28. He married Thomesen Hooper about 1545, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1606, in Tiverton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Steven Webber est né en 1526, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Weaver Webber, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Thomesen Hooper environ 1545, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1606, à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Steven Webber 1526 in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Weaver Webber 26 und seine Mutter Edith Elizabeth Hatch 28. Er hat um 1545 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Thomesen Hooper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1606 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tiverton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Steven Webber è nato il nel 1526 nel Bideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Weaver Webber, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Thomesen Hooper circa 1545, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1606, nel Tiverton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Steven Webberが1526年にイギリスイギリスデボンビデフォードで生まれた時，父John Weaver Webberは26歳，母Edith Elizabeth Hatchは28歳であった。約1545年にイギリスイギリスデボンでThomesen Hooperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1606年にイギリスイギリスデボンティバートンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Steven Webber(이)가 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Weaver Webber(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith Elizabeth Hatch(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Thomesen Hooper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1606년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 티버턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Steven Webber nasceu em 1526, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Weaver Webber, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomesen Hooper aproximadamente 1545, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1606, em Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Steven Webber родился в 1526 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Weaver Webber было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith Elizabeth Hatch, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomesen Hooper около 1545 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1606 г. в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Steven Webber nació en 1526, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Weaver Webber, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomesen Hooper aproximadamente 1545, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1606, en Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
